title: 3D Spears
description: This Texture pack Changes Ur 2D Spear textures to 3D!
body:
# 🪓⚔️ 3D Spears – Minecraft Resource Pack 🎯🛠️

Give your Minecraft spears a whole new dimension – literally!
This resource pack brings fully 3D-modeled spears to the game, replacing the default textures with immersive, realistic models designed to match the vanilla art style. Whether you're hunting mobs or just showing off, these spears now look as good as they feel! 💥🎮

## **🧱 Features:**

- ✅ 3D models for the new spear item 🪃
- 
- 🎨 Faithful to the vanilla aesthetic
- 
- ⚡ Lightweight and optimized for performance
- 
- 🛠️ Easy plug-and-play installation – no mods required!
- 
## **📦 Compatibility:**

- 🎮 Minecraft 1.21+ (with spears added)
- 
- Works great with OptiFine, Sodium, or vanilla
- 
- Can be used with other packs (just make sure it's on top!)

![3D spears Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/515f76b506b9f04e1e8daa30ae71eb4eb75a2415.png) **💬 Notes:**
- 
- 🗡️ This pack is purely cosmetic – no gameplay changes!
- 📥 Drop it in your resourcepacks folder, enable it in-game, and enjoy!
- 
- 🔗 Follow & Support:
- 
- If you like this pack, consider leaving a ⭐ or sharing it with friends! More 3D gear might be on the way! 👀
